case_title: DAVE PLEIMANN VS. MICHAEL SCARCE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLEIMANN, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT SCARCE, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION FOR DAILY RENTAL VALUE FOR PERMISES; AS TO DEFENDANT SCARCE, MICHAEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SCARCE, MICHAEL
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE NATIONWIDE RECOVERY NETWORK, INC. DBA JUDGMENT ENFORCEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SCARCE, MICHAEL
ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND LIFTING STAY OF EXECUTION

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLEIMANN, DAVE ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SCARCE, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLEIMANN, DAVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCARCE, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 485 GROVE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $2,110.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,110.00, DEFT LIABLE FOR ATTORNEY FEES & COURT COSTS INCURRED BY PLTF TO ENFORCE THIS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
